description: Style Note Heritage styling with a contemporary twist, this flying machine tee has a versatile appeal that you can style to match your mood. Pair this with your tried-and-true denims and stillettos on a lazy weekend. Product Details White printed racer back top with a braided right front strap back strap and right front strap. The top comes with a detachable yellow racer back top which can be worn together or separately  Material and Care 100% cotton Delicate machine wash cold Do not bleach or tumble dry Hang dry in shade Warm iron on reverse Do not iron on print or embroidery Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 32") is wearing a size S
